message:
fix: clippy fixes and rich output refinements

- epic.rs: Add .clone() for borrow checker compliance on styled strings
- audit.rs: Simplify always-false if-else chain to direct assignment
- history.rs: Add DiffStatusResult type alias for complex return type
- Various command files: Rich output integration and cleanup

Multiple agents contributed to this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

  "chrono",
  "clap",
  "clap_complete",
- "colored",

  "crossterm 0.28.1",
  "indicatif 0.18.3",
@@ -411,15 +410,6 @@ version = "1.0.4"
